flow-compare-revisions-header-postsummar:
Boggan wuxuu muujinayaa isbeddellada u dhexeeya laba nooc oo kooban ee mawduuca "[$4 $2]" ee [$3 $1].
Waxaad ka arki kartaa noocyada kale ee kooban ee mawduucan boggiisa [$5 bogga taariikhda].
flow-terms-of-use-summarize: Markaad gujiso "{{int:flow-topic-action-update-topic-summary}}", waxaad oggolaanaysaa shuruudaha isticmaalka ee wiki-kan.
